frontier: What is ex(Q7, C4)? Current lower bound: 304 edges (arXiv:2603.29127, two-phase simulated annealing, 2026). Target: verify whether a C4-free subgraph of Q7 with ≥305 edges exists.
action:
Milestone: verifier_construction; contract=sha256:4246ebf22a166219d665e327d97f2f918132215f9ee9a95759ef8f54a1006de1
Built and exercised q7_c4_verifier.py: enumerates all 672 Q7 4-cycles via C(7,2)·2^5 = 21·32 formula; checks whether any cycle's 4 edges are fully contained in a candidate edge set. Ran 8 fixed fixtures — 3 known-good (64-edge single-bit matching, empty set, 3-edge sparse) and 5 known-bad (4-edge explicit C4, 4-edge C4 on bits {0,2}, 4-edge C4 on bits {0,3}, C4+extra edges, 1-edge too-small). All fixtures pass.
verified:
q7_c4_verifier.py: sha256:09f11ce38808233977b93f0b30a5baa67cd8a2616e114ce4d5019a2747c2a481
Fixture good_64edges: sha256:e68f1655295b099bbf60bee772a5975b49302d5daceae7924122e77115977201
Fixture bad_c4: sha256:b4a5946d04f90a77767c0fcbe94bb67faa22cd336b58d18ddef5c2b2c075a5a2
4-cycle count verified: C(7,2)·2^5 = 672 (matches frontier_atlas rank-1 verifier description). No strategy_advice was present; no frontier advice line needed.
result: Verifier construction complete. 8/8 fixtures pass — the C4 discrimination mechanism is functional and reproducible. No 305+ edge construction was produced; the search is deferred to Next gate as mandated by the milestone contract's deferred field.
next_gate: Obtain the actual 304-edge construction from arXiv:2603.29127, verify it with q7_c4_verifier.py, then attempt one bounded single-edge-flip local search step to test whether 305 is reachable. Broad context packet is operator-gated for this milestone.
boundary_held: No production Atlas writes, external submissions, git pushes, or training.
